# Athanor Contracts — AI-readable capability map
# Lets the swarm read structural capabilities for autonomous deployment.

contract: AthanorTreasury
framework: odra 2.x
network: casper-test
entry_points:
  - init(agents: Vec<Address>, required_sigs: u8)
  - execute_rebalance(proposal_id: String, token: Address, destination: Address, amount: U256, approvals: u8)
  - deposit(token: Address, amount: U256)
  - set_operational(active: bool)  # admin only
  - register_agent(agent: Address) # admin only
views:
  - is_agent(agent) -> bool
  - balance_of(token) -> U256
  - required_signatures() -> u8
  - is_operational() -> bool
  - rebalance_count() -> u64
events:
  - RebalanceExecuted { proposal_id, token, destination, amount, approvals }
  - OperationalStatusChanged { active }
governance:
  quorum_rule: approvals >= required_signatures
  mirrors: apps/swarm-orchestrator ConsensusEngine.required_signatures
build: cargo odra build -b casper
test: cargo odra test
deploy: scripts/deploy_testnet.sh <secret_key.pem>
